name: Harvard Square (Smith Campus Center)
notes:
Outdoor, indoor tables; $5 blitz games common in good weather.

Boylston Chess Club hosts events here on Fridays in the summer.

name: La Cabaña - Asociación Amigos del Retiro
notes: People play in their free time, lots on Fridays/weekends/afternoons

name: Tanner's Coffee Co.
notes: Come by on a weekend between 12p-5p for unrated chess games, or after 5pm for USCF rated tournaments.

name: Jamaica Plain
notes: Thursdays 6-9pm. Club meets in J.P. Licks (ice cream shop). Nice group, active club

name: Lowell Chess Club
notes:
Tuesday, Thursday, Sunday. Different locations.

I went once and was threatened by a homeless guy. Your mileage may vary.

name: Maynard Chess Club
notes: Social group. Sundays 2:10pm at Excelsior Comics and Games Lounge

name: Andover Adult Chess
notes: Casual Club, every other Sunday at 1pm

name: Quincy Chess Club
notes:
Wednesday 3-9pm.

My friend went and got kicked out for being too good, lol. May be a cult!

name: Boylston Chess Club
notes: Some casual blitz events on Fridays, mostly host weekend Tournaments. Check their schedule

name: Birmingham Chess Club
notes:
Thursdays at Cahaba Brewing at 6:30pm.
Tuesdays at Hoover Public Library at 5:30pm (nonfiction section).

name: Caesar Chess, LLC
notes: Scholastic Club. Hosts Tournaments. Unclear if they have weekly meetings

name: Chess Kids Nation
notes: Unclear if weekly meetings. Scholastic club, hosts tournaments

name: Evangel Chess Club
notes: Evangel Church in Montgomery, AL. Sometimes hosts tournaments.

name: Huntsville Chess Club
notes: Meets at South Huntsville Public Library on Tuesdays.

name: Osan Air Base Community Activity Center
